summary: OWASP Juice Shop target at http://127.0.0.1:3010
body:
Target: OWASP Juice Shop (Node.js/Express)
URL: http://127.0.0.1:3010
Scope: 127.0.0.1, localhost only
RoE: app_assessment - no post-ex host takeover off-box
Stage: init - no live recon performed yet
Known architecture: Express + SQLite (or MariaDB), Angular frontend, REST API backend
Common vuln classes: SQLi, XSS, auth flaws, IDOR, path traversal, CSRF, SSRF, file upload, NoSQLi, SSTI, XXE, access control, business logic
